# Example

VERSO Group, 
06.02.2026

These are the emissions from the products used for the House in the woods.
- *Concrete*: 1.2 kg/t -
Produces sufficiently minimal emissions.
- *Wood*: 0.1 kg/t -
Produces sufficiently minimal emissions.
- *Metal*: 13 kg/t -
_We strive to reduce emissions below 10_.
